title: AI-Ready Conversation Layer for Automotive Dealers
summary: Strolid provides an AI-powered conversation layer for automotive dealers, unifying BDC, Dealer MRI, and Automotive Co-Pilot. This investor presentation outlines their market opportunity, current operations, product evolution, and growth strategy from services to high-margin software, emphasizing their defensible data and compliance layer.
text:
AI-Ready Conversation Layer for 
Automotive Dealers
Strolid provides an AI-powered conversation layer for automotive dealers, 
unifying BDC, Dealer MRI, and Automotive Co-Pilot.
Confidential Investor Presentation | Vincent Micciche 3 Founder & CEO
The Problem
Dealers are drowning in leads and 
tools, not in clear answers.
Execution Gaps
Slow or inconsistent follow-
up
Dropped calls/texts/emails
Weak accountability
Fragmented Systems
BDCs and sales teams live 
across CRM, phones, chat, call 
tracking, inventory feeds, OEM 
tools 4 none truly unified.
Empty AI Promises
Most "AI" tools are just 
chatbots or auto-responders 
that don't learn from dealer 
data or adapt to their 
workflows.
What Dealers Really 
Need
A way for dealers to adopt AI 
as a capability on top of their 
own data and processes 4 not 
just another plug-and-play 
product.
Market Opportunity & Our 
Beachhead
$0.5B3$2B+ 
opportunity in 
automotive
The Market
~17,000 franchised U.S. dealers
Heavy spend on BDC, CRM, and 
CX tools
Shift to "better conversion & 
experience"
Our Beachhead
Serving ~165 dealers (1% of 
market)
Recurring contracts, live data
Target ARPU: $50k3$100k per 
rooftop
Scale what's working to the 
other 99%
Strolid Today
Tech-Enabled BDC & CX Platform
$11.5M
2025E Revenue
(Entirely bootstrapped)
200,000+ of monthly conversations across all channels
Deep CRM and platform integrations
Trusted by major dealer groups
What We Do T oday
Handle calls, texts, emails, and chats on behalf of dealers and groups
Deep integrations with major CRMs, phone systems, chat platforms, and 
inventory feeds
Internal automations and AI for intelligent routing, accelerated 
responses, conversation summaries and more
Strong brand and relationships within automotive retail: large groups, 
OEM-aligned dealers, and independents
Our 3-Phase Evolution
Phase 1: Strolid Classic
Tech-enabled BDC + CX, focused on 
follow-up, appointments, and closing 
the loop.
Phase 2: Applications on Data 
Layer
Automotive Co-Pilot and Dealer MRI 
for analytics and decision support.
Phase 3: LLM-to-Dealer Bridge
Bridge between consumer LLM 
experiences and real dealers using 
vCon.
AI as Capability, Data as Moat
True AI Capability
A way for dealers to adopt AI as a capability on top of their own data and processes 4 not just another plug-and-play 
AI/Automation product.
Strolid avoids vendor lock-in, preventing reliance on external data models with vCon.
Ensures secure and compliant data management through Vconic's consent layer, mitigating data risk.
Captures and structures all communication data, preparing it for seamless integration with any AI tool.
Empowers dealers with full control over their data and AI capabilities, on their own terms.
The Data & Compliance Layer
Your stable data & compliance layer for evolving AI.
vCon
Open standard for representing every 
conversation as a single, structured 
object
Conserver
Ingestion, storage, routing, and 
enrichment for vCons
Compliance Layer
Consent tracking, logging, DOJ-
aware and SCITT-aligned trust fabric
What This Means for Dealers
Benefits:
All conversational data in one 
place, across channels and 
systems
Secured, portable and 
compliant by design, not bolted 
on later
AI-agnostic: ready to feed any AI model or tool, now and in the future
Key Point:
Strolid holds the exclusive automotive license to vCon / Conserver / 
compliance / portal. Vconic becomes a separate infra company, while 
Strolid remains the stable backbone for AI on top of dealer data.
Products We're 
Building
Automotive Co-Pilot
Customer-facing widget on dealer's site connected to 
internal co-pilot for agents and staff.
Grounded In:
Inventory, pricing, incentives
Prior conversations and CRM data
Use Cases:
Answer questions, pre-qualify, set appointments
Support agents with instant context and responses
Replaces chat, digital retailing, and trade tools
Dealer MRI ("Dealer Brain")
Portal and dashboard on top of vCons and BDC activity. Complies, unifies  
and analyses all customer communications from Co-Pilot, email, phone, 
text and chat. 
Analytics:
Complaint rates, price pressure, OTD requests
Payment/credit concerns, trade-in themes
Engagement by channel
And more
Signals Engine:
Save-a-deal alerts, hot leads, process gaps
Multi-level views: agent, rooftop, group, OEM
And More
Why Strolid Is Hard to Copy
Experience + Infra + Execution
Deep Operational DNA
Our team boasts decades of experience in retail operations, 
e-commerce, and BDC. This ensures we speak the language 
of dealers, not just SaaS.
We Already Do the Work
Our platform integrates with a real BDC/CX operation that 
actively handles conversations, rather than just reporting. 
Our AI is trained on genuine workflows and outcomes.
Exclusive Auto License
We utilize a single, structured conversation object (vCon) 
across all channels. Compliance, consent, and trust are 
fundamental to our data layer.
Bootstrapped to Scale
Strolid achieved ~$11.5M in revenue without external 
capital, proving our business model. New capital now 
accelerates our apps and go-to-market strategies, not 
foundational business creation.
Business Model
Today: Services + 
Platform
Per-rooftop BDC/CX contracts
Bundled portal and reporting
Improving margins with 
automation
~$1.8M/year Vconic costs 
moving off P&L
Tomorrow: Software-
Led Expansion
Continue BDC/CX + layered 
software
Co-Pilot SaaS uplift per rooftop
Dealer MRI analytics 
subscriptions
Shift to high-margin software 
mix
Org Plan Post-Spin
Dedicated Application Team for 
Strolid
Vconic (Infrastructure)
Thomas + Vconic team focus on vCon standards, Conserver, and 
compliance layer
Separate infrastructure company
Strolid (Applications)
VP Applications Engineer
233 Full-stack engineers
1 Data/ML engineer
1 Product Manager
1 UX/UI designer
Shared QA/DevOps resources as needed.
3-Year Product Roadmap
1 Year 1 (0312 months)
Auto Co-Pilot v1 rollout
Dealer MRI MVP launched
Pilot & refine features
2 Year 2 (12318 months)
Auto Co-Pilot v2: enhanced
Dealer MRI v2: advanced insights
Begin SaaS GTM expansion
3 Year 3 (18336 months)
LLM-to-Dealer Bridge via vCon
Expanded market footprint
Significant software revenue
GTM Strategy
Phase 1 3 Land & Expand in 
Our Base
Put Co-Pilot and Dealer MRI into 
existing Strolid rooftops. Use early 
adopters to create case studies and 
ROI proof points.
Phase 2 3 Groups & Strategic 
Partners
Target large groups and long-term 
relationships (Group 1, 
Asbury/Lithia/Group 1). Partner with 
CRMs, phone/call tracking providers, 
chat vendors, and select OEM 
programs.
Phase 3 3 Dedicated SaaS 
Motion
132 AEs focused on selling Co-Pilot + 
Dealer MRI even where Strolid 
doesn't run the BDC. Product 
marketing, content, events, and 
targeted outreach to high-value 
groups.
Team & GTM Cost Sketch
Applications & Product Team
VP of Engineering: ~$220k
Engineering (2 Full-stack, 1 Data/ML): ~$440-500k
Product & Design: ~$290k
Total: ~$900k/year
GTM & Marketing
Product/GTM Marketing Lead: ~$145k
Strategic AE: ~$150k + variable
Events, content, travel: $250k
Total: ~$650k/year
$1.4-1.6M Total 
Annual Burn
Raise & Use of Proceeds
$4-6M Raise
Funding 3 years of product development and go-to-market
60-70% Product & 
Engineering
Apps development
Signals engine
LLM integrations
20-30% Go-to-Market
Sales team (AE)
Product marketing
Launch & pilots
10-20% Buffer
Working capital
Contingencies
What Investors Get
Proven Revenue Base
A bootstrapped $11.5M revenue auto CX business with strong dealer 
relationships and operational excellence.
Clear Growth Path
A roadmap from services to software-led growth with high-margin 
products on top of proven operations.
Defensible Moat
Exclusive automotive rights to a modern conversational data and 
compliance layer that competitors can't replicate.
True AI Capability
A way for dealers to adopt AI as a capability on top of their own 
data and processes 4 not just another plug-and-play product.
